title: Chief of Staff
must_haves: Operate at founder-level intensity, turn strategy into execution, founders' right hand (MEETS: founder-adjacent, first employee)
Build financial models and investor pitches (PARTIAL: built pitch decks/investor updates; financial modelling not evidenced)
Design workflows and write strategy documents (MEETS: ops, market research, workstream design)
Strong commercial instincts / business fundamentals, comfort with ambiguity (MEETS)
hard_blockers: Domain: AI risk infrastructure / frameworks & quantification models — heavy on financial modelling and quantitative rigour, an area Ryan is light on
Advisor pedigree (MIT/Stanford/Columbia/Goldman/hedge funds) signals a quant/finance-leaning bar
met_strengths: Genuine founder's-right-hand experience (Minima FA, first employee, 1->30)
Investor-facing: pitch decks, investor updates, fundraising support across seed + Series A
one_line_verdict: Real CoS/founder's-right-hand DNA fits, but governr's risk-quantification/financial-modelling slant and quant-finance advisor bar make this a Stretch rather than a clean match.
fetch_note: Open via ZipRecruiter (453289607). governr building risk infrastructure / quantification models for the AI economy. CoS works directly with founders; emphasis on financial models, investor pitches, strategy docs. Found via WebSearch; ZipRecruiter.co.uk pages often 403 on direct fetch but listing confirmed active.
